# Send Letterboxd ratings to IMDb

Queue ratings missing from IMDb through your existing encrypted IMDb connection.

> Security: Use disposable test accounts and non-personal sample data. Cover cookies, API keys, emails, names, and identifiers with solid opaque blocks before saving. Never blur a secret and never place an unredacted source image in the repository. Inspect the final image at full resolution and remove metadata before adding it.

## 1. Import both fresh exports

Import the latest IMDb ratings CSV and Letterboxd ZIP before comparing them.

In Rapid Rater: **Open Sync Movies**

> **Screenshot needed:** Rapid Rater Sync Movies with current IMDb and Letterboxd sources and safe example totals.
>
> **Solid-redact:** Signed-in email, Personally identifying watch history

Last verified: Pending screenshot capture.

## 2. Review what will be sent

Open Review matches and problems. Conflicts and unmatched films are never sent automatically.

> **Screenshot needed:** Rapid Rater expanded review showing safe sample matches, a conflict, and an unmatched title.
>
> **Solid-redact:** Signed-in email, Personally identifying titles

Last verified: Pending screenshot capture.

## 3. Check the IMDb connection

Connect IMDb first if the status says it is required.

In Rapid Rater: **Open IMDb connection**

> **Screenshot needed:** Rapid Rater connection status and IMDb connection control, with no cookie visible.
>
> **Solid-redact:** Signed-in email, Cookie value

Last verified: Pending screenshot capture.

## 4. Send the missing ratings

Choose Send missing ratings to IMDb. Rapid Rater queues them and shows delivery progress.

In Rapid Rater: **Send missing ratings to IMDb**

> **Screenshot needed:** Letterboxd to IMDb section with the send control, safe example count, and delivery status visible.
>
> **Solid-redact:** Signed-in email, Personally identifying titles, Cookie value

Last verified: Pending screenshot capture.
